subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Truth! In the path of God thou hast endured tribulations and hardships, and become a wanderer through mountain and desert [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق در سبیل الهی مورد صدمات و زحمات گشتی و سرگشته کوه و بیابان شدی و
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
